text:
A = Separate CHIP (Title XXI) claim: a fee-for-service (FFS) claim 

B = Separate CHIP (Title XXI) claim: capitated payment 

C = Separate CHIP (Title XXI) encounter record that simulates a bill for a service or items rendered to a 
patient covered under some form of Capitation Plan. This includes billing records submitted by 
providers to non-state entities (e.g., MCOs, health plans) for which a state has no financial liability 
as the at-risk entity has already received a capitated payment
